# Pull Request

## Description

Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Specification clarification
- [ ] New feature (RFC accepted)
- [ ] Schema modification (RFC accepted)
- [ ] Example or tutorial addition

## Related Issues

- Fixes #
- Implements RFC #
- References #

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes follow the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] I have added/updated CHANGELOG.md (for accepted changes)
- [ ] My commits have clear, descriptive messages
- [ ] I have referenced the related issue/RFC
- [ ] For specification changes: An RFC was accepted before this PR

## Specification Changes (if applicable)

For changes to the specification, confirm:

- [ ] An RFC was opened first
- [ ] RFC has been reviewed for 30+ days
- [ ] RFC was approved by Technical Committee
- [ ] Backward compatibility is documented
- [ ] Migration guide provided (if breaking)

## Testing

How were these changes tested?

- [ ] Schema validation against examples
- [ ] Cross-reference with related sections
- [ ] Reviewed by domain expert

## Additional Notes

Any other information reviewers should know.
